name: AMB Check Cashing Corporation
description_short: AMB Check Cashing Corporation offers check cashing, money orders, and related financial services at their Brooklyn location with extended weekday hours.
description_long: AMB Check Cashing Corporation operates as a check-cashing service located in the Williamsburg neighborhood of Brooklyn, New York. The business is situated at 111 Lee Ave, Suite 2, providing financial services to the local community. Check-cashing services have been a cornerstone of financial access for unbanked and underbanked consumers for decades, offering alternatives to traditional banking infrastructure. Based on the available information, AMB Check Cashing appears to be an independently operated local service provider. The company maintains a physical storefront location with regular operating hours and a direct phone line for customer inquiries. Their presence in a densely populated urban area suggests they serve a diverse clientele seeking quick financial transactions without traditional banking requirements. AMB Check Cashing Corporation offers core check-cashing services along with money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment options—standard offerings for businesses in this category. These services are designed for customers who need immediate access to funds or prefer transactional services outside the traditional banking system. The specific service menu is not detailed beyond the category classification, but typical check-cashing operations provide rapid fund access and fee-based transactions. What distinguishes AMB Check Cashing is its location in a high-density residential area and its consistent operating schedule. The business maintains Monday-through-Thursday hours from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM, with Friday hours ending at 1:30 PM, providing reasonable accessibility for working-age customers. Their local presence and direct phone contact suggest a community-focused operation rather than a chain establishment. For consumers seeking check-cashing services, AMB Check Cashing represents a traditional brick-and-mortar option in Brooklyn. However, the limited information available from their web presence means prospective customers should contact them directly to verify current service offerings, fee structures, and specific terms. As with all check-cashing services, fees and rates should be compared with alternatives before use.
pros: Convenient Brooklyn location in Williamsburg neighborhood at 111 Lee Ave
Extended weekday hours (9:30 AM - 5:30 PM Monday-Thursday) for working customers
Direct phone contact available at (718) 486-8101 for customer service
Consistent operating schedule with predictable hours
Multiple services beyond check-cashing including money orders and wire transfers
Local, established business serving the community
No requirement for bank account to access services
cons: Limited online presence and website information makes service details and fee structures unclear
Early Friday closing at 1:30 PM limits weekend access for check deposits
No online check-cashing or digital service options mentioned
Check-cashing services typically carry higher fees than traditional banks
No information available regarding fee schedules or service terms on public listing
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts
Williamsburg residents needing quick check-cashing service
Customers who prefer in-person transactions and immediate fund access
Small businesses or individuals requiring money orders or wire transfer services
diagnosis: AMB Check Cashing Corporation is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in the Brooklyn area who need quick check-cashing services without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is that detailed service information, current fee structures, and specific terms are not available online—direct contact with the business is necessary before using their services.
